description: A variable condition's value is resolved once at compile time and frozen into the compiled generation; a live variable write after compilation does not change how the already-compiled edge generation evaluates the condition until a new generation is compiled.

events.note: app-side write; generation 1 is still the applied generation on the (offline) edge engine

results.reason: the edge engine has not applied a new generation; it continues evaluating the stale-but-defined frozen value from generation 1, never performing a live lookup

expected.note: a new generation compiled after seq 3 would freeze guest_mode: true and this condition would then fail; that recompilation is out of this case's scope
